rules.rule: All libraries and APIs must use semantic versioning: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.
MAJOR version must be incremented for breaking changes.
MINOR version must be incremented for backward-compatible features.
PATCH version must be incremented for backward-compatible bug fixes.
API version must appear in the URL path: /api/v{major}/.
Previous API versions must be maintained until all consumers migrate.
Version must be declared in the <Version> element in the .csproj file.
